title: Investment Analyst
description: Unilever is seeking an Investment Analyst to support capital allocation and mergers & acquisitions activities. Evaluate market opportunities, conduct financial due diligence, and develop investment theses for strategic acquisitions and partnerships. Work remotely for a global FMCG leader managing a diverse portfolio from beauty to nutrition.
responsibilities: Analyze potential acquisition targets and market entry opportunities
Develop financial models and valuation analyses for investment decisions
Conduct due diligence on target companies including financial, operational, and strategic fit assessments
Prepare investment memos and recommendations for senior management
Monitor portfolio companies post-acquisition and track investment performance

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Business, or related field
skills: Financial modeling (DCF, comparable companies, precedent transactions)

benefits: Competitive base salary plus performance incentives
